{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Archlord water artist
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wavedancer]] pushed away an [[Archlord water artist]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
